change_summary: Extracted a shared `SnapshotPreparation` path in `src/MLF/Constraint/Presolution/View.hs` that sanitizes snapshot UF data once and derives canonical map/query data from the sanitized UF.

Rewired `src/MLF/Constraint/Finalize.hs` to reuse the shared preparation for `stepSanitizeSnapshotUf`, `presolutionViewFromSnapshot`, and `finalizePresolutionViewFromSnapshot`, removing the old build-then-override `PresolutionView` path.
Preserved thesis-sensitive semantics: `fromPresolutionResult` still uses raw `rewriteConstraintWithUF`, while finalize paths still use repaired/finalized canonical-constraint construction.
Updated `implementation_notes.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` to document the bounded no-semantics-change cleanup and recorded the validation runs.
Validated with the named parity checks, `cabal test --test-show-details=direct`, and `cabal build all && cabal test`.
